title: Sweet and Savory Ouzi Tacos
description: A unique twist on traditional tacos, combining the sweetness of sweet ouzi and the savory flavors of eastern spices.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry and cut into taco-sized squares.
In a bowl, mix together the beaten eggs, eastern spice blend, and a pinch of salt.
Spoon a small amount of the egg mixture onto each pastry square, leaving a 1/2 inch border.
Place a piece of sweet ouzi on top of the egg mixture.
Fold the pastry squares in half to form a taco shape and press the edges to seal.
Place the tacos on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and brush with a little bit of lime juice.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
While the tacos are baking, heat a pan over medium heat and cook the diced avocado until slightly softened.
Warm a tortilla in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few pieces of salsa on the tortilla, followed by a taco, a dollop of avocado, and a sprinkle of queso fresco and cilantro.
